name: MacBook Air M1
description: Portable dev machine for writing, reviewing, and shipping code on the go.
whyIUseIt: Excellent battery life, silent operation, and enough performance for everyday web development.

name: GIGABYTE GS27QCA
description: Primary high-refresh display used for development, detailed UI work, and smooth navigation.
whyIUseIt: 1440p gives better workspace density, and 165Hz keeps motion and scrolling fluid.

name: Visual Studio Code
description: Primary editor for SvelteKit and TypeScript projects.
whyIUseIt: Fast workflow with great extensions, Git integration, and reliable debugging.

name: Bun
description: Main runtime and package manager for local project scripts.
whyIUseIt: Simple commands and fast installs keep iteration speed high.

name: GitHub
description: Code hosting, pull requests, and deployment workflows.
whyIUseIt: Keeps collaboration and release history organized across projects.

name: Figma
description: Used for quick UI composition and design references before implementation.
whyIUseIt: Helps plan layout and spacing decisions before writing production code.
